data.body:
## Description

Expand SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md with a comprehensive Prohibited Fix Patterns section. Merge with existing prohibitions on lines 18-19 (skip/disable tests, suppression comments) — deduplicate, do not duplicate.

**Five anti-patterns to cover:**
1. **Skipping or removing tests** — deleting test files/functions, @pytest.mark.skip, removing test cases that fail
2. **Loosening assertions** — weakening assert conditions, broadening tolerance, replacing strict checks with permissive ones
3. **Broad exception handlers** — bare except:, except Exception:, catching everything to silence errors
4. **Downgrading error severity** — changing ERROR to WARNING, removing error logging, converting failures to soft warnings
5. **Commenting out failing code** — commenting out code that produces errors instead of fixing the root cause

**For each pattern include:**
- Pattern name and one-line description
- Code example showing the bad pattern (what NOT to do)
- Rationale explaining why this is harmful
- Concrete 'Do this instead' alternative with code example

**Merge with existing**: Lines 18-19 already prohibit test skipping and suppression comments. Integrate these into the new section rather than duplicating.

### Files to modify
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/docs/SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md contains 'Prohibited Fix Patterns' heading
  Verify: grep -q 'Prohibited Fix Patterns' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md
- [ ] All 5 anti-pattern categories present
  Verify: grep -cE 'Skipping or removing tests|Loosening assertions|Broad exception handlers|Downgrading error severity|Commenting out failing code' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] Each anti-pattern has a 'Do this instead' alternative
  Verify: grep -c 'Do this instead' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] Existing prohibitions are merged, not duplicated
  Verify: grep -c 'Skip, disable, or delete any tests' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md | awk '{exit ($1 > 1)}'
- [ ] RED tests from Task 1 now pass (GREEN)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python -m pytest tests/docs/test_sub_agent_boundaries_anti_coverup.py --tb=short -q
